stories.headline: April Crypto Hack Toll Hits $606M, Worst Month Since Bybit Breach
stories.tldr: Crypto protocols lost $606M across 12 exploits in the first 18 days of April, the worst monthly theft tally since February 2025's Bybit incident.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: DeFi attack frequency is up 68% year-over-year, signaling audits and bug bounties aren't keeping pace with cross-chain attack surface.
the_details: Drift Protocol drained for $285M on April 1 via DPRK-linked social engineering and a fabricated CarbonVote (CVT) token.
Kelp DAO's rsETH LayerZero bridge bled $292M on April 18, stranding 116,500 rsETH across 20 chains.
47 DeFi exploit incidents through April 2026 vs 28 in the same window of 2025 — a 68% YoY jump.

stories.headline: 100+ Crypto Firms Press Senate to Mark Up CLARITY Act This Spring
stories.tldr: A coalition of 100-plus firms led by Coinbase and Ripple petitioned the Senate Banking Committee April 23 to mark up the CLARITY Act.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Industry estimates for 2026 passage still span 25-60%, with stablecoin yield treatment as the swing variable for whether a US framework lands this cycle.
the_details: Letter signed by 100+ firms including Coinbase and Ripple targets immediate Senate Banking Committee markup.
The Block flags stablecoin yield rules and Trump's crypto conflicts as the two stuck points blocking progress.
SEC and CFTC already issued a March 17 joint release establishing a five-category token taxonomy.

stories.headline: Spot Solana ETFs Cross $1B AUM as Goldman Builds $108M Position
stories.tldr: Spot SOL ETFs have crossed $1B in combined AUM with $35M of net weekly inflows and a reported $108M Goldman Sachs allocation.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Goldman's footprint legitimizes SOL as an institutional allocation just as the $77-$94 consolidation band tightens for a likely volatile breakout.
the_details: Spot Solana ETF AUM tops $1 billion, $35.17M in net inflows over the past week.
Goldman Sachs disclosure shows roughly $108M position across the SOL ETF complex.
SOL holds a $77-$94 range with analysts warning of an imminent volatile breakout.

stories.headline: Bitcoin-Dollar Inverse Correlation Hits -0.90, Most Extreme Since 2022
stories.tldr: BTC's 30-day correlation with the US Dollar Index has dropped to -0.90, the deepest negative reading in nearly four years.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Roughly 81% of recent short-term BTC moves now track DXY, recasting bitcoin as a leveraged macro short on the dollar rather than an idiosyncratic asset.
the_details: 30-day BTC/DXY correlation printed -0.90, the most negative since 2022.
About 81% of recent short-term BTC price moves are statistically linked to dollar index shifts.
Rally has stalled as DXY rebounded amid Pentagon-flagged inflation and geopolitical risks.

stories.headline: Vercel Breach Forces Crypto Devs Into Mass API Key Rotation
stories.tldr: A breach at hosting provider Vercel sent crypto developers scrambling on April 20 to rotate API keys and lock down deployment pipelines.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Most DeFi front-ends and dashboards ride on Vercel, so any compromise of its build infrastructure becomes a direct supply-chain risk for traders.
the_details: Incident triggered industry-wide audit of stored RPC keys, environment variables, and webhook secrets.
Lands the same week DEX aggregator CoW Swap disclosed a $1.2M loss from an April 14 domain hijacking.
Reinforces 2026 trend: front-end and infra layers are now targeted alongside on-chain protocols.
